summary: Smoke check resilience: try multiple container types for exec probes + external hostname fallback

changes.description: Smoke checks now try php-fpm, nginx, php-fpm-admin, and cron containers when looking for a local container to exec into. Previously only tried php-fpm, which could miss if that service wasn't scheduled on the agent's node.

When all internal overlay-network probes fail after the 3-minute retry window, the smoke check now tries an external HTTPS probe against the environment hostname. If the site responds 2xx/3xx externally, the deploy is marked healthy. This prevents false failures from Docker overlay DNS issues.
